---
title: "TODO: SOP title"
owner: TODO Owner
revisions:
  - rev: A
    date: TODO-YYYY-MM-DD
    author: TODO-author
    approved-by: ""          # advisor / lab manager sign-off
    description: Initial release
---

<!-- Reference template for every SOP in this directory. Copy this
file and rename it `SOP-NN-procedure-slug.qmd`, register it in
_quarto.yml under the Operations part, and append the matching
`{{< include _revisions-SOP-NN-procedure-slug.md >}}` line at the
bottom. The three `.content-visible` blocks below render conditionally
per Quarto profile (sop-detailed / sop-checklist / sop-walkthrough) —
edit each block for the audience of that variant.

The `revisions:` block is the formal engineering revision record,
rendered by the {{< revisions >}} shortcode below: add a row (Rev B,
C, …) whenever the procedure materially changes, and get it signed
off via `approved-by`. The auto-generated git change history at the
bottom is the forensic complement — it tracks every commit, no
ceremony. -->

{{< revisions >}}

## Purpose

> TODO: One sentence on what this procedure accomplishes and when it
> applies.

## Prerequisites

> TODO: What must be true before starting (state of the equipment,
> tools in hand, prior SOPs completed).

::: {.content-visible when-profile="sop-detailed"}

## Detailed procedure

> TODO: Long-form narrative walkthrough with rationale, failure
> modes, and cross-references.

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="sop-checklist"}

## Checklist

- [ ] TODO step 1
- [ ] TODO step 2
- [ ] TODO step 3

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="sop-walkthrough"}

## Guided walkthrough

> TODO: Screenshot/video-heavy first-time-user version. Embed
> `{{< video >}}` clips and annotated images from the experiment
> library as needed.

:::

## Verification

> TODO: How to confirm the procedure completed successfully.
